statusLine.command: input=$(cat); user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); style=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.output_style.name'); display_cwd="${cwd/#$HOME/~}"; if [ -d "$cwd/.git" ] || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null; git_branch=$(git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$git_branch" ]; then git_status=$(git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); modified=$(echo "$git_status" | grep -c '^ M' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); untracked=$(echo "$git_status" | grep -c '^??' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); staged=$(echo "$git_status" | grep -c '^[MARC]' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); git_indicators=""; [ "$staged" -gt 0 ] && git_indicators="${git_indicators}+"; [ "$modified" -gt 0 ] && git_indicators="${git_indicators}!"; [ "$untracked" -gt 0 ] && git_indicators="${git_indicators}?"; if [ -n "$git_indicators" ]; then git_info=" $(printf '\033[35m')($git_branch $(printf '\033[33m')$git_indicators$(printf '\033[35m'))$(printf '\033[0m')"; else git_info=" $(printf '\033[35m')($git_branch)$(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; else git_info=""; fi; else git_info=""; fi; printf "$(printf '\033[32m')%s@%s$(printf '\033[0m'):$(printf '\033[34m')%s$(printf '\033[0m')%s $(printf '\033[33m')[%s]$(printf '\033[0m') $(printf '\033[36m')%s$(printf '\033[0m')" "$user" "$host" "$display_cwd" "$git_info" "$model" "$style"
